gist.headline: OpenCode meets the hive
gist.blurb: A sweet new community integration just dropped! You can now easily generate an opencode.json config file packed with all your favorite Pollinations text models.
gist.summary: Added the opencode-pollinations-conf tool to the community showcase, which automatically generates OpenCode configurations using Pollinations text models.
gist.impact: Developers can now quickly set up OpenCode environments pre-configured with Pollinations' diverse range of text generation models.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about OpenCode and JSON configuration files. Visual symbols: a glowing blueprint or JSON file, code-plants. Characters: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot working together to configure a system.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot looking at a glowing lime green (#ecf874) blueprint of a JSON configuration file. The robot's screen shows pixelated text models. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
